title: Overview of JEE Advanced 2026

detail.title: Overview of JEE Advanced 2026
detail.short_info: JEE Advanced 2026 Application Form is open. Registration started on April 23, 2026 and the last date has been extended till May 5, 2026 (11:59 PM). Check eligibility (Top 2,50,000 in JEE Main 2026), application fee, step-by-step registration process, exam date (May 17, 2026) and direct link.

content.text: The registration process for JEE (Advanced) 2026 opened on April 23, 2026 (10:00 AM IST) for candidates who qualified JEE Main 2026. The last date for registration has been extended till May 5, 2026 (11:59 PM IST). The last date for fee payment is May 4, 2026 (11:59 PM IST). The examination is scheduled to be held on May 17, 2026.

JEE Advanced 2026 is the second stage of the Joint Entrance Examination conducted for admission to undergraduate engineering programmes at the 23 Indian Institutes of Technology (IITs). Only candidates who are among the top 2,50,000 successful candidates (including all categories) in JEE Main 2026 (Paper 1) are eligible to appear. The exam consists of two compulsory papers (Paper 1 and Paper 2).

rows: Rank among top 2,50,000 candidates (category-wise) in JEE Main 2026
Born on or after October 1, 2001 (5-year relaxation for SC/ST/PwD)
Maximum 2 attempts in two consecutive years
First appeared in Class 12 (or equivalent) in 2025 or 2026
Not have been admitted to any IIT programme earlier (with specific exceptions)
May 17, 2026 (Paper 1: 9 AM–12 PM; Paper 2: 2:30 PM–5:30 PM)

sections.heading: How to Apply Online for JEE Advanced 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Visit the official JEE Advanced website.
Register using your JEE Main 2026 roll number, password, and security pin.
Fill in personal details such as name, parents’ names, contact details, and address.
Select up to eight preferred exam cities.
Upload scanned copies of passport-size photograph and signature.
Verify all details, pay the application fee, and submit the form.
Class 10 certificate (for date of birth)
Class 12 marksheet/certificate
Category certificates (GEN-EWS, OBC-NCL, SC, ST, PwD) – issued on or after April 1, 2026
Passport-size photograph and signature
JEE Main 2026 admit card/rank proof (for verification)
